tasks.title: Define SQLite schema for all entities (users, messages, projects, tasks, decisions, risks, follow-ups, summaries, patterns) with required fields and relationships
Initialize Telegram bot with long polling, command routing, and inline keyboard handling (architecture setup)
Implement message intake for text/voice/image/document with STT/OCR, media storage, and metadata handling
Build rules-first categorizer with NLP fallback for message classification
Create capture card UI with category buttons, project picker, and auto-filled content
Implement task creation flow (title → priority → deadline) with inline editing and confirmation
Develop paginated tasks list screen with filters (project/priority/due) and inline 'Done' actions
Implement project creation flow with name, description, and status management
Build projects list screen showing active projects with counts and Archive/Open actions
Implement decision creation flow (context → choice) with resolution tracking and confirmation
Implement risk creation flow (description → severity → mitigation) with status tracking
Implement follow-up creation flow (deadline → priority) with reference to task/decision/risk
Schedule weekly digest generation (Sunday 18:00 user-local) with structured data aggregation
Implement nightly pattern detection (03:00 user-local) for recurring phrases ≥3x in 7 days
Generate JSON export for all user data including last 4 summaries and media references
Implement 60s cron job to check follow-ups with deadline ≤ now and notified_at IS NULL
